raw_response: {"claim": "LLMs exhibit some degree of noise robustness in RAG, but accuracy decreases significantly when the noise ratio exceeds 80% (e.g., ChatGPT drops from 96.33% to 76.00% and ChatGLM2-6B from 91.33% to 57.33% at p<0.05), with errors primarily stemming from long-distance information, evidence uncertainty, and concept confusion."}
